title: Zoho One Implementation — 300+ Users
description: Complete Zoho One suite deployment for a large energy services company, automating operations across departments.
highlights: Deployed Zoho One for 300+ users across multiple departments
Automated lead-to-deal pipeline reducing manual work by 60%
Integrated with third-party ERP for seamless data sync
Trained 50+ users on CRM best practices

title: Healthcare CRM & Patient Management
description: Custom Zoho CRM solution for a healthcare provider to manage patient records, appointments, and follow-ups.
highlights: Built custom modules for patient lifecycle management
Automated appointment reminders via SMS and email
HIPAA-compliant data handling workflows
Reduced patient follow-up time by 40%

title: Custom Inventory Management App
description: Zoho Creator application for a manufacturing client to track inventory, purchase orders, and vendor management.
highlights: Built multi-warehouse inventory tracking system
Automated reorder alerts based on stock thresholds
Custom dashboards for real-time inventory visibility
Integrated with Zoho Books for financial reconciliation

title: Zoho Books — Multi-Entity Accounting
description: Configured Zoho Books for a logistics company with multiple entities, automating invoicing and expense tracking.
highlights: Set up multi-entity accounting with inter-company transactions
Automated recurring invoicing for 200+ clients
Integrated payment gateways for online collections
Custom financial reports for management review

title: Payment Gateway & ERP Integration
description: Connected Zoho CRM with Razorpay and client's legacy ERP system for real-time payment tracking and order sync.
highlights: Built REST API connectors for Razorpay payment webhooks
Real-time order status sync between ERP and Zoho CRM
Automated payment reconciliation reducing errors by 90%
Custom error handling and retry mechanisms

title: Real Estate Lead Management System
description: End-to-end Zoho CRM setup for a real estate firm to capture, nurture, and convert property leads.
highlights: Integrated with 99acres and MagicBricks for auto lead capture
Built property matching algorithm using Deluge
Automated drip campaigns for lead nurturing
Custom site-visit scheduling and tracking module

title: Travel Agency Booking Automation
description: Zoho Creator app for a travel agency to manage bookings, itineraries, and vendor coordination.
highlights: Custom booking management with itinerary builder
Automated vendor communication and confirmation workflows
